title: RNA Extraction and Library Preparation for Mouse Proximal Large Intestine Sequencing
author: Anastasiya Moiseyenko
materials: ABclonal FAST RNA-seq Library Prep Kit

steps.title: Dissect approximately 1 cm of proximal...
steps.instruction: Dissect approximately 1 cm of proximal large intestine from each mouse.

steps.title: Immediately place tissue into TRIzol reagent...
steps.instruction: Immediately place tissue into TRIzol reagent (Zymo Research) and flash-freeze on dry ice.

steps.title: Store samples at –80 °C until RNA extraction
steps.instruction: Store samples at –80 °C until RNA extraction.

steps.title: Extract total RNA using the Direct-zol...
steps.instruction: Extract total RNA using the Direct-zol RNA MiniPrep Plus Kit (Zymo Research) according to the manufacturer’s protocol.

steps.title: Perform on-column DNase I treatment as...
steps.instruction: Perform on-column DNase I treatment as specified by the kit to remove genomic DNA.

steps.title: Measure RNA concentration and purity using a NanoDrop spectrophotometer
steps.instruction: Measure RNA concentration and purity using a NanoDrop spectrophotometer.

steps.title: Assess RNA integrity using an Agilent 2100 Bioanalyzer
steps.instruction: Assess RNA integrity using an Agilent 2100 Bioanalyzer.

steps.title: Prepare RNA-seq libraries using the ABclonal...
steps.instruction: Prepare RNA-seq libraries using the ABclonal FAST RNA-seq Library Prep Kit according to the manufacturer’s instructions.

steps.title: Perform sequencing using 50 bp paired-end...
steps.instruction: Perform sequencing using 50 bp paired-end reads on an Illumina NovaSeq X platform with a target a sequencing depth of ~30 million reads per sample.

steps.title: Align raw sequencing reads to the...
steps.instruction: Align raw sequencing reads to the Mus musculus GRCm36 Primary Assembly reference genome (GENCODE Release M36) using STAR aligner v2.7.1 with default parameters.

steps.title: Import count data into R (v4
steps.instruction: Import count data into R (v4.3.0). Normalize counts and perform differential expression analysis using the DESeq2 package.

steps.title: Perform gene ontology and pathway enrichment...
steps.instruction: Perform gene ontology and pathway enrichment analyses using the clusterProfiler package. Using the following criteria: Adjusted p-value < 0.1, log2 fold change > 0.2

steps.title: Quantify gene-level read counts using featureCounts
steps.instruction: Quantify gene-level read counts using featureCounts. Retain only protein-coding genes with a minimum total count ≥ 10 across all samples.

steps.title: Identify differentially expressed genes by an adjusted p-value < 0
steps.instruction: Identify differentially expressed genes by an adjusted p-value < 0.05 and Log2 fold change threshold as defined per comparison.
